objective: Produce the first standalone external remediation intake operator agent package and prepare a terminal proof pack that validates it without external APIs.
scope: create generated_agents/remediation_intake_operator_agent_v1 as a standalone external operator agent package
include README, AGENT_SPEC, RUNBOOK, input and output examples, runtime script, proof notes
include a PHASE67 pack that copies the validator payload, validates the package, writes proof/report, finalizes live truth, and commits/pushes only at runtime
leave runtime proof/report uncreated before terminal proof execution
validation: PowerShell parser check passes for PHASE67 APPLY.ps1
PowerShell parser check passes for generated agent run.ps1
PowerShell parser check passes for PHASE67 validator payload
all new JSON files parse successfully
forbidden_scope: do not touch the conveyor module
do not modify PHASE64/65/66 proof/report files
do not create a new self-building conveyor stage
do not commit or push during preparation
do not run the PHASE67 runtime pack during preparation
